conditions.analyte_polymer: PS-b-PMMA and Blends of PS and PMMA
conditions.critical_condition_basis: critical point of adsorption of PS
conditions.evidence_text: Blends and copolymers of PS and PMMA were analysed by LC coupled to[1] H NMR at the critical point of adsorption. The separation of the polymers was achieved at chromatographic conditions that correspond to the critical point of PS and the size-exclusion mode of PMMA.
conditions.notes: The text mentions the use of ACN and THF as mobile phase but does not specify the exact ratio required to achieve the critical condition for PS.

conditions.analyte_polymer: PS-b-PMMA copolymers and blends of PS and PMMA
conditions.critical_condition_basis: critical point of adsorption of PS
conditions.evidence_text: Figure 2 shows the critical diagram for using Nucleosil RP-18 columns at ambient temperature (22 8C). The critical conditions correspond to a mobile phase composition of THF–ACN of 48:52 v/v... These critical conditions are used for the analysis of blends of PS and PMMA as well as for PS-b-PMMA copolymers.
conditions.notes: PMMA elutes in SEC mode under these conditions.
